github_repos.name: microsoft/BitNet.cpp
github_repos.description: Official inference framework for 1-bit LLMs. Can theoretically run a 100-billion parameter language model on a single CPU at human reading speed. MIT licensed.

github_repos.name: lightpanda-io/browser
github_repos.description: Headless browser built from scratch in Zig, designed exclusively for AI agents and web automation. 9-11x faster and uses 16x less memory than Chrome over the network.

github_repos.name: 666ghj/MiroFish
github_repos.description: A concise and universal swarm intelligence engine for predicting a wide array of phenomena. Emerging as a trending repository for AI prediction models.

ai_news.title: Nvidia CEO Forecasts $1 Trillion in AI Chip Revenue by 2027
ai_news.description: Jensen Huang projects that sales of Nvidia's Vera Rubin and Blackwell systems will exceed $1 trillion over the next two years, doubling previous forecasts of $500 billion.

ai_news.title: Amazon CEO Sees AI Doubling AWS Sales to $600 Billion by 2036
ai_news.description: Andy Jassy said during an internal all-hands meeting he expects AI could help Amazon Web Services achieve $600 billion in annual sales, double his prior estimate.

ai_news.title: Mystery AI Model Sparks DeepSeek V4 Speculation
ai_news.description: A free model named 'Hunter Alpha' surfaced on OpenRouter with 1 trillion parameters and 1M token context window. Tests suggest it's a Chinese AI with knowledge cutoff of May 2025.

ai_news.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano Models
ai_news.description: OpenAI has positioned GPT-5.4 as its leading model for professional workflows across ChatGPT and Codex, following increased competition from Google's Gemini and Anthropic's Claude.

ai_news.title: Microsoft Shakes Up Copilot AI Leadership Team
ai_news.description: Microsoft is bringing together engineering groups for commercial and consumer Copilot assistants. Jacob Andreou from Snap becomes EVP in charge of Copilot experience.

ai_news.title: Anthropic Seeks Weapons Expert to Stop 'Catastrophic Misuse'
ai_news.description: The AI firm is looking to hire a chemical weapons and high-yield explosives expert to try to prevent catastrophic misuse of its software.

ai_news.title: Tencent Reports 13% Revenue Increase Driven by AI Services
ai_news.description: Tencent Holdings reported strong demand for gaming and growth in its artificial intelligence services, cementing its position as China's largest social media and gaming company.

ai_news.title: Meta Planning Sweeping Layoffs as AI Costs Mount
ai_news.description: Meta is reportedly planning significant workforce reductions as the company grapples with mounting costs from its AI infrastructure investments.
